raw_title: Colm Kincaid: Opening statement - joint Oireachtas Committee on Finance, Public Expenditure, Public Service Reform and Digitalisation, and Taoiseach
raw_content: Opening statement by Mr Colm Kincaid, Deputy Governor of the Central Bank of Ireland, before the Joint Oireachtas (National Parliament) Committee on Finance, Public Expenditure, Public Service Reform and Digitalisation, and Taoiseach (Head of Parliament), Dublin, 18 March 2026.
